name: Courier Gadget - Decay Knives
messages: Your Courier Bag pops open, and a bevy of robotic limbs tipped with sharp blades lash out in a flurry of attacks!
<npc_name>'s Courier Bag lashes out at %s with a series of robotic limbs!

name: Courier Gadget - Decay Hammer
messages: 'beep beep, creating distance!' Poludnitsa unfolds and pushes away nearby enemies!
<npc_name>'s Courier Bag shoves away nearby foes!

name: Rip Space
messages: You drag %s through a dimensional tear!

name: Warp Corp's Train Clearing Techniques
description: A series of combat techniques straight from the training manuals of Warp Corp. With these skills, even the most congested train cars will be cleaned before something something im tired.
initiate: You take a stance, ready for cleanup duty.
%s prepares for another shift of cleanup duty.

onhit_buffs.name: W-Corp Charge
onhit_buffs.description: Gain Charge through damage, then unleash power with a savage strike!

name: R-Corp's 4th Pack Grazing Techniques
description: A training manual straight from R-Corp's Hatcheries. All good Rabbits, Reindeer, and Rhinos know that to disregard the basics is to
initiate: You prepare to graze the grass.]

onhit_buffs.name: R-Corp Charge
onhit_buffs.description: As you graze the grass, your body becomes entranced in the feeding frenzy
